# StrideShip

> AI-powered customs and logistics automation for Indian freight forwarders, customs house agents (CHAs), and import/export businesses.

## About

StrideShip builds custom operational automation systems for logistics businesses in India. We replace manual document processing, data entry, and workflow coordination with AI-powered infrastructure. Every system is custom-built — no templates, no off-the-shelf software.

## Core Services

- **Document Processing & Automation**: AI-powered parsing of PDF invoices, packing lists, commercial documents into structured data. Bill of Entry (BOE) automation for ICEGATE filing.
- **RFQ & Quote Automation**: Convert unstructured email requests into accurate, formatted quotes with audit trails.
- **Shipment Tracking Systems**: Multi-carrier real-time tracking with automated milestone alerts and exception detection.
- **Operations Dashboards**: Live KPIs, team performance monitoring, and automated reporting.
- **System Integration**: Connect CRM, ERP (Softlink, Logi-Sys, SAP), carrier APIs into a unified operational layer.
- **Workflow Automation**: End-to-end automation of RFQ pipelines, shipment coordination, and customs document workflows.

## Target Industries

- Custom House Agents (CHAs)
- Freight Forwarders
- LCL Consolidators
- 3PL Providers
- NVOCC Operators
- Importers & Exporters
- Clearance Agents

## Key Capabilities

- Bill of Entry automation for Indian customs
- ICEGATE filing preparation
- HSN code classification and validation
- BCD/IGST/CVD/SWS duty calculation
- DGFT filing and duty credit scrip tracking (RoDTEP, DFIA, SEIS)
- Compliance prerequisite checking (BIS, LMPC, FSSAI, CDSCO)
- Multi-carrier shipment tracking
- Commercial invoice and packing list data extraction

## Location

Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
